T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
27 
EMER_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 
LABEL: 
Emergency Services Provider Classification Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether any of the provider’s classification code values map to the emergency medical 
service provider category; ever in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: EMER_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 
LONG NAME: EMER_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 
TYPE:
